_doc: Module 6 prospect profiles. Primary: Lukas, brief §12.4 verbatim (DE hospitality, 4-location restaurant group, low trust on new fintechs). Secondary: a synthetic trust-driven prospect for variability of practice (4cid-blueprint.md §3.3). Anonymised first names only; no PII per brief §7.

prospects.top_pain: Expense fraud (fired someone last year) + multi-currency on Italian supplier
prospects.top_objection: I don't trust new fintechs with my money
prospects.trigger_line: I don't trust new fintechs with my money. What happens to my money if you go under?
prospects.module_role: primary trigger + solo problem buyer · all 3 reg questions come from Lukas

prospects.top_pain: Previous payments vendor lost a SOC2 audit mid-renewal; nervous about repeating that
prospects.top_objection: Show me your regulator first; we'll discuss product second.
prospects.trigger_line: Before we talk product — who actually holds the licence, and which national regulator audits you?
prospects.module_role: secondary variability prospect · referenced in v2 backlog cards (not in v1 timeline)
